blended.narrative: Lost Trail is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 16 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,257 ft. Looking ahead, 29 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 8" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 55".
